name: swe-workflow
description: Role-scoped SDLC workflow skills. Install the plugin(s) for your role.

plugins.name: swe-workflow-backend
plugins.description: Skills for service, API, and data work: design, test-first implementation, performance, and shipping. (18 skills)

plugins.name: swe-workflow-frontend
plugins.description: Skills for UI/UX, component architecture, accessibility, and client-side performance. (14 skills)

plugins.name: swe-workflow-devops
plugins.description: Skills for CI/CD, containers, infrastructure-as-code, delivery, observability, and incidents. (17 skills)

plugins.name: swe-workflow-ml
plugins.description: Skills for ML pipelines, experiment tracking, model deployment, and the data/observability around them. (12 skills)

plugins.name: swe-workflow-security
plugins.description: Skills for security audits, dependency/CVE management, blast-radius analysis, and incident handling. (12 skills)

plugins.name: swe-workflow-architect
plugins.description: Skills for structural decisions, documentation, contracts, blast radius, and technical-debt strategy. (14 skills)

plugins.name: swe-workflow-em
plugins.description: Skills for planning, estimation, metrics, retros, proposals, and steering reviews and incidents. (9 skills)

plugins.name: swe-workflow-pm
plugins.description: Skills for proposals, PRDs/specs, estimation, OKRs/metrics, and retrospectives. (6 skills)

plugins.name: swe-workflow-qa
plugins.description: Skills for test-first development, coverage strategy, test data, review, and systematic debugging. (9 skills)

plugins.name: swe-workflow-designer
plugins.description: Skills for user flows, accessibility, product requirements, and the frontend architecture that realizes them. (5 skills)
